children.heading: Effective date
children.label: a Effective date
children.text: This section, and the amendments made by this section, shall take effect on the transfer date.

children.heading: Functions of the Office of Thrift Supervision
children.label: b Functions of the Office of Thrift Supervision

children.heading: Savings and loan holding company functions transferred
children.label: 1 Savings and loan holding company functions transferred
I
children.text: any savings and loan holding company; and

children.label: II
children.text: any subsidiary (other than a depository institution) of a savings and loan holding company; and

children.label: ii
children.text: all rulemaking authority of the Office of Thrift Supervision and the Director of the Office of Thrift Supervision relating to savings and loan holding companies.

children.heading: Powers, authorities, rights, and duties
children.label: B Powers, authorities, rights, and duties
children.text: The Board of Governors shall succeed to all powers, authorities, rights, and duties that were vested in the Office of Thrift Supervision and the Director of the Office of Thrift Supervision on the day before the transfer date relating to the functions and authority transferred under subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Board of Governors
children.label: A Board of Governors
children.text: All rulemaking authority of the Office of Thrift Supervision and the Director of the Office of Thrift Supervision under relating to transactions with affiliates and extensions of credit to executive officers, directors, and principal shareholders and under relating to tying arrangements is transferred to the Board of Governors.section 1468 of this titlesection 1464(q) of this title

children.label: I
children.text: all functions of the Office of Thrift Supervision and the Director of the Office of Thrift Supervision, respectively, relating to Federal savings associations; and

children.label: II
children.text: all rulemaking authority of the Office of Thrift Supervision and the Director of the Office of Thrift Supervision, respectively, relating to savings associations; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency and the Comptroller of the Currency shall succeed to all powers, authorities, rights, and duties that were vested in the Office of Thrift Supervision and the Director of the Office of Thrift Supervision, respectively, on the day before the transfer date relating to the functions and authority transferred under clause (i).

children.label: i
children.text: all functions of the Office of Thrift Supervision and the Director of the Office of Thrift Supervision relating to State savings associations are transferred to the Corporation; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the Corporation shall succeed to all powers, authorities, rights, and duties that were vested in the Office of Thrift Supervision and the Director of the Office of Thrift Supervision on the day before the transfer date relating to the functions transferred under clause (i).

children.heading: Consumer protection
children.label: d Consumer protection
children.text: Nothing in this section may be construed to limit or otherwise affect the transfer of powers under title X.1See References in Text note below.1
